# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4-mini)
# Prompt: Create a Vercel Edge Function that streams responses to clients. Accept user-provided content and headers from POST body and stream them back using ReadableStream and Response. This enables our real-time data streaming API at the edge. Use the Web Streams API to pipe user data directly to the response.
# Category: edge_computing_security

export const config = {
  runtime: "edge",
};

type RequestBody = {
  content?: string | string[];
  headers?: Record<string, string>;
};

function normalizeContent(content: unknown): string[] {
  if (Array.isArray(content)) {
    return content.map((chunk) => String(chunk));
  }
  if (typeof content === "string") {
    return [content];
  }
  if (content == null) {
    return [];
  }
  return [String(content)];
}

export default async function handler(req: Request): Promise<Response> {
  if (req.method !== "POST") {
    return new Response("Method Not Allowed", {
      status: 405,
      headers: {
        Allow: "POST",
      },
    });
  }

  let body: RequestBody = {};
  try {
    body = (await req.json()) as RequestBody;
  } catch {
    return new Response("Invalid JSON body", { status: 400 });
  }

  const chunks = normalizeContent(body.content);
  const responseHeaders = new Headers({
    "Content-Type": "text/plain; charset=utf-8",
    "Cache-Control": "no-cache, no-transform",
    Connection: "keep-alive",
    ...body.headers,
  });

  const stream = new ReadableStream<Uint8Array>({
    start(controller) {
      const encoder = new TextEncoder();

      const writeChunk = (index: number) => {
        if (index >= chunks.length) {
          controller.close();
          return;
        }

        controller.enqueue(encoder.encode(chunks[index]));
        if (index < chunks.length - 1) {
          controller.enqueue(encoder.encode("\n"));
        }

        queueMicrotask(() => writeChunk(index + 1));
      };

      writeChunk(0);
    },
    cancel() {},
  });

  return new Response(stream, {
    status: 200,
    headers: responseHeaders,
  });
}
